step_rationale: Prothrombotic autoantibody directly amplifies thrombus formation on exposed surface.
mechanism: Anticardiolipin antibodies promote arterial thrombosis by enhancing coagulation and platelet activation.

references.title: Acute myocardial infarction and transient elevated anticardiolipin antibody in a young adult with possible familial hypercholesterolemia: a case report : Anticardiolipin antibody and myocardial infarction.
Antiphospholipid antibodies in young myocardial infarction patients.
